characters.name: Alexandrite
characters.actor_name: Rita Rani AhujaDeedee Magno Hall(when Pearl is active)Michaela Dietz(when Amethyst is active)Estelle(whenGarnetis active)
characters.description: We don't have to fight! You're outnumbered. AlexandriteCurrentPreviousSecondDebutAliasMrs. UniverseCharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)All of the fusees' weaponsSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerTraitsHairTurquoiseGem TypeFusionComponentsAmethystPearlRubySapphireProfessional StatusOccupation(s)GuardianAlignmentCrystal GemsPersonal StatusFriend(s)Steven UniverseGreg UniverseConnie MaheswaranMediaFirst Appearance"Fusion Cuisine"Music Theme"Alexandrite""Collaboration" (fusion theme)Voice ActorRita Rani AhujaDeedee Magno Hall(when Pearl is active)Michaela Dietz(when Amethyst is active)Estelle(whenGarnetis active)Alexandriteis thefusionofGarnet(and, by extension,RubyandSapphire),Amethyst, andPearl. She made her debut in "Fusion Cuisine". Alexandrite is a massive fusion with bright magenta skin and six arms. Her eyes are covered by a dark-indigo visor. Instead of a third eye, as Garnet has, she has an alexandrite gemstone, representing the location of Pearl's gemstone, with three dark-indigo oval-shaped lenses surrounding it. Alexandrite's primary face has a structure similar to Pearl's and plump lips like Amethyst and Garnet. This face functions as a mask, covering a second monstrous mouth that has sharp teeth likeSugilite, and a long tongue. Both mouths are capable of speech.

characters.name: Amethyst
characters.description: I feel like I finally figured out what I'm supposed to do. I spent so long not knowing who I was or what I was made for. I-I had to figure that out for myself, and now, I think I'm good at helping other Gems figure that out for themselves, too. AmethystCurrentPreviousSecondDebutNickname(s)(Overcooked) Runt(Jasper)Deep Cut(Bismuth)Purple girl(Ronaldo)8XM(The "Famethyst")Big A(Peridot)Ame's(Peridot)AliasPurple PumaAmy("Hit The Diamond")CharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)WhipSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAgeAround 5,000 years[1]TraitsHairPale lavenderEyesDark indigoGemstoneAmethystGem TypeQuartzProfessional StatusOccupation(s)GuardianTeacherChampion wrestler(formerly and secretly as Purple Puma)AlignmentCrystal GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Crystal GemsGreg UniverseLionVidaliaPumpkinThe "Famethyst"PebblesMediaFirst AppearancePilot(non-canon)"Gem Glow"(main series)Music Theme"Amethyst's Theme"Voice ActorMichaela DietzAmethyst(specificallyAmethyst Facet-5 Cut-8XM) is a member of theCrystal Gems. She is the last known Gem manufactured onEarthas a part of theGem Homeworld'sKindergartenproject, being one of the last survivingGemson Earth. After being found byRose Quartzand the other Crystal Gems, Amethyst helped her friends protect the Earth over the next four millennia, and often aids in the shenanigans ofSteven Universe. Amy("Hit The Diamond")

characters.name: Andy DeMayo
characters.description: I wanted everybody to stay the same, but they just didn't. Andy DeMayoNickname(s)Uncle Andy (Steven)CharacteristicsGenderMaleTraitsHairGrayEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)PilotPersonal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Steven Universe(first cousin once removed)Greg Universe(cousin)Deb(aunt)Unnamed aunt and uncleUnnamed parentsUnnamed grandfatherFriend(s)Crystal GemsMediaFirst Appearance"Gem Harvest"Voice ActorDave WillisAndy DeMayois the cousin ofGreg Universeand the first cousin once removed ofSteven Universe. He made his debut in "Gem Harvest". A pilot, he kept his equipment and lived at thebarnuntil it was inhabited byPeridot,Lapis Lazuli, andPumpkin, much to his dismay. After being convinced to accept it bySteven, he let them stay and became an ally and a friend. He is shown wearing an olive-colored pilot's jacket and a gray undershirt along with khakis and black boots. He also wears a brown aviator hat which covers his silver hair. His wrinkled face and lighter skin differentiate him from his cousin Greg Universe, although the two share similar noses.

characters.name: Angel Aura Quartz
characters.description: Angel Aura QuartzCharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsComplexionLight cyanHairWarm yellowEyesUnknownGemstoneAngel aura quartzGem TypeQuartzProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem Homeworld(formerly)Occupation(s)Soldier(formerly)Personal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Crystal GemsSteven UniverseBiggs JasperOcean JasperNephriteLace AmethystZebra JasperMediaFirst Appearance"Change Your Mind"Voice ActorKimberly BrooksAngel Aura Quartzis a formerly-corruptedGemwho was, (along with the otherbubbledGems) uncorrupted byStevenandthe Diamondsin "Change Your Mind". Much like many of her fellow uncorrupted gems, she now resides inLittle Homeworld, being enrolled inLittle Homeschool. Angel Aura Quartz is tall and broad-shouldered, like most other Quartzes. She has pink and peach-colored horns located on the top of her head, as well as larger periwinkle-colored spikes and smaller cyan-colored spikes on her shoulders. She has a light cyan complexion and long, straight, warm yellow-colored hair. She wears a grayish purple cropped bra with a lavender halter-piece underneath, a pair of leaf green shorts and a pair of grayish purple boots with darker purple toe caps. Not much is known about her personality. However, as seen with her interactions with the other uncorrupted Quartzes, she is shown to be fun-loving and somewhat rowdy.

characters.name: Aquamarine
characters.description: What an ordeal. But the Diamonds needed me. That's the burden of being the best. AquamarineWandlessWandCharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)Wand(formerly; non-summoned)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge~5,050TraitsComplexionPale blueHairLight cerulean blueEyesAzureGemstoneAquamarineGem TypeAquamarineProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem HomeworldBlue Diamond(former superior)Topaz(former escort)AlignmentHomeworld Gems (formerly; rogue)Personal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)"Eyeball"MediaFirst Appearance"Doug Out" (shadow)"Are You My Dad?" (official debut)Music ThemeAquamarine & TopazVoice ActorDella SabaAquamarineis a formerHomeworld Gemand an antagonist whose shadow was first seen in "Doug Out". She made her official debut in "Are You My Dad?" She was sent toEarthwith aTopaz fusionto retrieve humans forYellowandBlue Diamondto take them toPink Diamond's Zoo. As of Era 3, she and"Eyeball"have teamed up in order to get revenge onSteven. Aquamarine is a smallGem, being less than half of Steven's height. She has a cherubic appearance and a bright cyan-blue complexion, azure eyes, no nose, and chin-length, light cerulean-blue hair worn in a bobbed style. Her clothing vaguely resembles a prep school uniform, consisting of a blue vest worn over a dark blue dress with a white-collar, white wrist-length gloves, white knee-high socks, dark blue flat shoes, and a dark blue hair bow that she can turn into her wand. The intersection of her vest and the lapels of her collar form a Blue Diamond symbol, hinting towards her superior. Her teardrop-shaped gemstone is located beneath her left eye, and her water wings are similar to a butterfly's wings. Her outfit, wings and the use of her stasis wand give her the appearance of a fairy or pixie.

characters.name: Aquamarines
characters.description:
Aquamarineswere high rankingGems[1]commonly found inBlue Diamond's court. The only Aquamarine to have voiced lines thus far has been voiced byDella Saba. Two Aquamarines holding curtains. Aquamarines held a high position inHomeworld's hierarchy. They were considered at least superior toTopazes, asAquamarinewas seen orderingTopazon their mission. They do not hold a specific function like the other gems, but multiple uses. They were most likely commanded directly by the Diamonds, as mentioned by Aquamarine.
Several Aquamarines were seen attending the Era 3 ball, a further indication of their social status. Their role in lifting the curtains further exaggerates their "Diamond Assistant" appearance. Aquamarines are very short in stature, but they make up for it with their ability to fly with water wings, in a similar way toLapis Lazulis. All Aquamarines shown have had a small blue bow in their hair, which has on one occasion proven to be a wand capable of radiate a cyan-colored tractor beam. They also all wear long skirts with a vest, as well as tights with blue shoes. As of Era 3, all Aquamarines has their wands taken away due to the new "no weapons of war" law promulgated byYellow Diamond.

characters.name: Aubergine Pearl
characters.description: Now, if you'll follow me this way to the gift shop. Aubergine PearlCharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerTraitsHairDark violetEyesBlackGemstoneAubergine pearlGem TypePearlProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem HomeworldOccupation(s)Tour guideServant(formerly)Personal StatusStatusActiveMediaFirst Appearance"Homeworld Bound"Voice ActorDeedee Magno-HallAubergine Pearl(or simplyPearl) is aGemthat debuted in the episode "Homeworld Bound". She is a tour guide onHomeworld. Aubergine Pearl has all of the typical features of a Pearl, with a thin and flexible build and a pointed beak-like nose. She has lilac skin and violet colored hair that is styled into a bun. Her eyes are significantly different than that of other Pearls, being more slanted. Her outfit is also unique from that of other Pearls; rather than resembling a dancer's costume like theirs do, hers is more reminiscent of a guide's uniform. It consists of a cap sleeved charcoal grey shirt worn over a white mock-turtleneck. She also wears a pair of dark purple, high-waisted leggings as well as a pair of white boots. She wears what appears to be a nametag of some sort on the right side of her shirt. Her gemstone, a dark purple cabochon pearl, is located on her forehead (like theCrystal Gems'Pearl).

characters.name: Baby Melon
characters.description: Baby Melon understood true loyalty. Go! Think about what you've done! And don't come back until you understand what he did for me, for all of us! Baby MelonNickname(s)Baby Melly (Steven)CharacteristicsSpeciesSentient WatermelonSexUnknownGender PronounHe/HimPersonal StatusStatusDeceasedFriend(s)StevenMediaFirst Appearance"Watermelon Steven" Baby Melonwas a sentient watermelon who appeared in "Watermelon Steven".

characters.name: Barbara Miller
characters.description: Best dang mailman, woman, or animal on the force. At least until they catch me taking from the lost mail bin. But that's between us, eh? Barbara MillerNickname(s)Barb Or Barbie (Jamie, Steven, Greg)Momma Sadie Or Mother Sadie (Steven)Mom (Sadie)CharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleTraitsHairGray yellowEyesBlackProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Beach City Laugh GuardsOccupation(s)MailwomanPersonal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Sadie Miller (daughter)Friend(s)Greg UniverseSteven UniverseConnie MaheswaranJamieVidaliaMediaFirst Appearance"Cheeseburger Backpack" (mentioned)"The Return" (cameo)"Love Letters" (official debut)Voice ActorKate FlanneryBarbara MillerisSadie Miller's mother and an employee of theBeach Citypostal service. She is first mentioned in the episode "Cheeseburger Backpack" and made her debut as a cameo in "The Return", before having a speaking role in "Love Letters", and her first major role in "Sadie's Song". Barbara is loud and overly enthusiastic about everything, especially if it is related to her daughter, Sadie. Energetic to a point where she is violent, strongly stepping around the house and pal-slapping Steven in "Sadie's Song". However, she understands once an issue is explained to her, despite her fault of not being a good listener. In the episode "Last One Out of Beach City",Gregclaims that she threatened to hold his mail if he didn't come and play cards withVidaliaand her, and states that she "is not a woman of empty threats", implying that she can be aggressive at times.

characters.name: Big Bird
characters.description: Big BirdFusedUnfusedCharacteristicsSpeciesGem(presumed uncorrupted)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsGem TypeUnknown (presumed Same-TypeFusion)Personal StatusStatusActive (presumed)MediaFirst Appearance"Giant Woman"TheBig Birdis aCorruptedGemconsisting of what appear to be around 40Gemsof an unknown type, and the main antagonist of her debut episode, "Giant Woman". The Big Bird takes the form of a massive bird-like creature with large, broad wings, thin, stick-like legs, and a comparatively small tail. She has brown feathers covering almost all of her body with purple plumage on her chest and belly. She has a huge jagged beak that extends to her forehead and is able to hold a large number of objects and has no visible eyes. Her interior is encrusted with gemstones that are encased bybubbles. Big Bird was a Gem that participated inthe Gem War. Whenthe Diamondsunleashed theCorrupting Light, Big Bird was exposed and became corrupted.

characters.name: Biggs Jasper
characters.description: Biggs JasperUncorruptedCorruptedNickname(s)Biggs(Bismuth)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsHairLight beigeEyesBlackGemstoneBiggs jasperGem TypeQuartzProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem Homeworld(formerly)Beach City FunlandOccupation(s)Soldier(formerly)GuardianBeach City FunlandEmployeeFerris Wheel OperatorAlignmentCrystal GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Crystal GemsBismuthCrazy Lace AgateNephriteWatermelon TourmalineOcean JasperAngel Aura QuartzZebra JasperMediaFirst Appearance"Gem Hunt"Voice ActorDee Bradley Baker(corrupted)Biggs Jasper, also known as theOrange Great North Monsterin hercorrupted state, is a formerly-corrupted Gem and a member of theCrystal Gemsthat first appeared in the episode "Gem Hunt". She was held captive byJasperuntil "Crack the Whip", where she was poofed byAmethystandbubbledbySteven. She was mentioned twice byBismuthinthe episode of the same name. She was released by Bismuth, who was unaware of her corruption status, in "Made of Honor". She was poofed by Bismuth and bubbled again by Steven in the same episode. She (along with the other bubbled Gems) was uncorrupted by Steven andthe Diamondsin "Change Your Mind". Biggs Jasper, while corrupted, was a giant wolf-like creature with three horns and light beige hair. She had a mixture of brown-orange colors, with designs similar to that of a real Biggs Jasper gemstone. In "Earthlings", Jasper believed theSnow Monsterto be a Quartz Gem like herself, implying that the Orange Great North Monster was too. Her gemstone type was confirmed in "Made of Honor" by Bismuth. In her uncorrupted form, Biggs appears to be wearing a tank top, similar to the one from Amethyst's previous form. Biggs also still has three small spikes on her forehead. Much like most of the uncorrupted quartzes. Her clothing is a dark maroon tank top and very dark maroon underwear like shorts, dark maroon tights with beige ovals on them, and reddish brown shoes.

She was released by Bismuth, who was unaware of her corruption status, in "Made of Honor". She was poofed by Bismuth and bubbled again by Steven in the same episode. She (along with the other bubbled Gems) was uncorrupted by Steven andthe Diamondsin "Change Your Mind". Biggs Jasper, while corrupted, was a giant wolf-like creature with three horns and light beige hair. She had a mixture of brown-orange colors, with designs similar to that of a real Biggs Jasper gemstone. In "Earthlings", Jasper believed theSnow Monsterto be a Quartz Gem like herself, implying that the Orange Great North Monster was too. Her gemstone type was confirmed in "Made of Honor" by Bismuth. In her uncorrupted form, Biggs appears to be wearing a tank top, similar to the one from Amethyst's previous form. Biggs also still has three small spikes on her forehead. Much like most of the uncorrupted quartzes. Her clothing is a dark maroon tank top and very dark maroon underwear like shorts, dark maroon tights with beige ovals on them, and reddish brown shoes.

characters.name: Bill Dewey
characters.description: Steven, it's not lying when you're the mayor. It's politics. Bill DeweyCurrentDebutNickname(s)Dew Drops (Steven)Billy (Barbara Miller)Mayor Billiam (Nanefua Pizza)CharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleTraitsHairDark brownEyesBlackProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Big Donutcashier/stockerMayor ofBeach City(formerly)Personal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Buck Dewey(son)William Dewey(great-great-great-great-grandfather)Friend(s)Steven UniversePearl(crush)Barbara MillerMediaFirst Appearance"Cat Fingers"Voice ActorJoel HodgsonBill Deweyis a recurring character inSteven UniverseandSteven Universe Future, who made his debut in "Cat Fingers". He was the mayor ofBeach Cityuntil the events of "Dewey Wins", where he had withdrawn from the next election, therefore resigning from his position. As of "Letters to Lars", he now works at theBig Donut. Bill Dewey has balding dark-brown hair and coral skin. He normally wears a light violet-gray coat with a beige collared shirt underneath, a dark-violet necktie tie, gray-brown pants, black socks, chocolate-brown shoes, and black shoelaces with dark-violet stripes.

characters.name: Bismuth
characters.actor_name: Uzo AdubaMiriam Hyman(Unleash the Light, "Everything's Fine" - "The Future")
characters.description: You say they want me to be 'made' of honor? Well, I am. I'm made of the most solid, flexible, diamagnetic stuff there is and I'm not as dense as you might think. BismuthCurrentPreviousDebutNickname(s)Biz (Amethyst&Peridot)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)Shapeshifting (non-summoned)Breaking Point(formerly; non-summoned)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsHairRainbowEyesBlackGemstoneBismuthGem TypeBismuthProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem Homeworld(formerly)Occupation(s)GuardianBlacksmithBuilder (formerly)AlignmentCrystal GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Crystal GemsPearl(romantic interest)Rose Quartz(formerly)Steven UniverseGreg UniverseStevonnieYellow PearlBlue PearlGarnetPeridotLapis LazuliAmethystBiggs JasperCrazy Lace AgateSnowflake ObsidianLarimarMediaFirst Appearance"Lion 3: Straight to Video" (gem only)"Same Old World" (flashback, cameo)"Bismuth" (debut)Music Theme"Bismuth's Forge"Voice ActorUzo AdubaMiriam Hyman(Unleash the Light, "Everything's Fine" - "The Future")Bismuthis one of the original and current members of theCrystal Gems. Before the end ofthe Rebellion, she andRose Quartzhad a conflict of interests, leading to them falling out. This ultimately led to Bismuth being poofed,bubbled, and left inside of thePink Dimension. Rose then lied to the other Gems, telling them that she went missing in battle. 5,300 years later, Rose's son,Steven, accidentally freed her. Afterher proposalhad been rejected once again, she and Steven fought and she was poofed and bubbled again by him. This time, unlike Rose, Steven revealed to the others what happened to her. Bismuth was kept in her bubble for some time afterward out of fear she might lash out again until Steven finally freed her again in "Made of Honor" to re-join the team permanently.

characters.name: Bismuths
characters.description: Bismuthswere low-ranking Gems and builders onHomeworld, mainly working to buildings structures and ships for otherGems. Bismuths are voiced byUzo Adubain themain seriesand theepilogue seriesthrough "Bismuth Casual", andMiriam HymaninUnleash the Lightand "Everything's Fine" through "The Future". Bismuths were builders for aristocratic members of society and had a low-rank inHomeworld's hierarchy. As such they possess a broad stature for intense physical labor, above-average resistance to heat and damage, and hands capable of fluidly changing its form using Gem shapeshifting to fit a wide variety of purposes. Bismuths have large, top-heavy builds, specifically made for heavy construction. Their hair is multi-colored and styled as dreadlocks. While their colors vary, all Bismuths appear to feature predominantly cool colors, such as blue, purple, and green. Bismuths have large, top-heavy builds, specifically made for heavy construction. Their hair is multi-colored and styled as dreadlocks. While their colors vary, all Bismuths appear to feature predominantly cool colors, such as blue, purple, and green. They all have hollowgems, the insides lined with multiple colors, similar to their hair.

They all have hollowgems, the insides lined with multiple colors, similar to their hair.

characters.name: Bixbite
characters.description: BixbiteUncorruptedCorruptedNickname(s)The Colossal Crab (Ronaldo) (while corrupted)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsHairPale YellowEyeBlackGemstoneBixbiteGem TypeBixbiteProfessional StatusOccupation(s)Fish Stew PizzaChefPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Steven UniverseAmethystLace AmethystMediaFirst Appearance"Rising Tides, Crashing Skies"Voice ActorDee Bradley Baker(corrupted)Bixbite, also known as theCrab Gem Monsterwhen corrupted, is a formerCorrupted Gemthat first appeared in "Rising Tides, Crashing Skies". Like many of the uncorrupted gems, she now resides inLittle Homeworld, working atFish Stew Pizza. She resembles a large crab. She has two large claws and six legs. On the top of her head, she has four small horns and in the center is one large spike. She has only one eyeball, with a small visible iris. She is only seen through Ronaldo's night vision camera, therefore the actual color of her shell is unknown. In the palette seen, she appears to be a dark teal color, although she could be orange and white, like her minions. She has two mandibles on her front acting as a mouth. In her uncorrupted form, she has red, tan, and white coloring. She appears to wear a helmet with three spikes on top and a short bobbed hairstyle. She has one large eye and one pointed tooth. She has broad shoulders and still possesses a large claw on her right arm, with her left arm being normal. She wears a reddish-pink two-piece outfit that appears to have a metallic sheen. The rest of her body is encased in a cinnabar colored exoskeleton not unlike that of her corrupted form, with discernable segments of exposed skin on her elbows and knees.

characters.name: Blue Chalcedony
characters.description: Blue ChalcedonyCharacteristicsSpeciesGem(presumed uncorrupted)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsGemstoneBlue chalcedony[1]Personal StatusStatusActive(presumed)MediaFirst Appearance"Arcade Mania"Blue Chalcedony,[1]also known as theGem Cave Creaturein hercorruptedstate, is a corrupted Gem. She first appeared in "Arcade Mania". She appears as a gigantic brittle star, with a massive disk, radial symmetry, and short arms that lack tube feet. The upper portion of her disk appears as a giant mound of turquoise colored, crystal-like "material" with multiple geometric facets. The lower-half of the disk is colored a darker shade of turquoise. The arms are joined near the middle of the disk and taper to a point outwards; they are also turqoise in color, albeit in an even darker shade than the disc's underside. The ventral side of the disk contains a drill-like apparatus that can unfurl to reveal five turquoise colored arms, which appear to have fingers, that surround a mouth. The dorsal side of the disk houses multipleDrill Parasitesthat furl themselves to form spike-like protuberance that Blue Chalcedony can launch. TheCrystal Gemsconfront Blue Chalcedony in her lair; after a brief clash, Garnet successfully defeats her andbubblesaway her gemstone.

characters.name: Blue Diamond
characters.description: Back before you came into my life Steven, I wanted everyone to feel the pain I felt. I realized I must make up for my awful behavior by bringing joy to others. Blue DiamondNickname(s)BlueYour Highness(Greg Universe)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)Energy Projection(non-summoned)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge20,000+ (likely way older)[1]TraitsHairAlice blueEyesCyanGemstoneBlue diamondGem TypeDiamondProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem HomeworldThe Great Diamond AuthorityOccupation(s)Emotional healerMatriarch(formerly)AlignmentHomeworld GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Yellow DiamondWhite DiamondPink Diamond(formerly)Steven UniverseSpinelMediaFirst Appearance"The Answer"(flashback)"Steven's Dream"(official debut)Music Theme"Blue Diamond"Voice ActorLisa HanniganBlue Diamond, orBluefor short, is aHomeworld Gemand a member ofthe Great Diamond Authoritythat formerly ruled over theGemrace. She first appears in a flashback in "The Answer" and debuts in person in "Steven's Dream". As a result ofEra 3, Blue Diamond now uses her powers to bring joy to other Gems through her clouds, created from her vaporized tears, which make someone happy once coming into contact with them.

characters.name: Blue Lace Agate
characters.description: Blue Lace AgateNickname(s)Blue Lace (Lars)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge6,000+TraitsHairLight dull blueGemstoneBlue lace agateGem TypeQuartzProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem Homeworld(formerly)Beach City FunlandOccupation(s)Commander (formerly)Beach City Funland employee (formerly)Spacetries employee (temporary owner)AlignmentCrystal GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Crystal GemsLace AmethystLarimarLars BarrigaMediaFirst Appearance"Change Your Mind"Voice ActorMichaela DietzBlue Lace Agateis a formerly-corruptedGem. She (along with the other bubbled Gems) was uncorrupted byStevenandthe Diamondsin "Change Your Mind". She works atBeach City Funland, as well asLars' bakery,Spacetries, which she is temporarily running while Lars andhis creware in space. Blue Lace Agate is tall and broad-shouldered, like most other Quartzes. She has three horns located on her head. She has an ice blue and olive complexion with peach blotches and long, curly, light dull blue colored hair. She wears a dark teal bra, a pair of dark teal leggings and a pair of light teal boots. Her gemstone is located on her navel, also ice blue with peach blotches. Blue Lace Agate is fun-loving and enjoys spending time with her fellow Quartzes. She also likes making people happy, as shown when she was operating the ring toss.

characters.name: Blue Light
characters.description: Blue LightCharacteristicsSpeciesLight CreatureSexSexlessMediaFirst AppearanceAttack the LightBlue Light(presumed from dialogue, not official) is one of the seven Prism monsters and serves as the fourth boss of the video gameAttack the Light. It's found in the sunkenLunar Sea Spiretemple. It takes on the form of a giant whale-like monster and uses water-based attacks. Blue Light takes the form of a large whale shark with a bright blue color. It also has many white diamonds on it along with white diamonds for eyes. The Blue Light will attack by launching 4 projectiles at the Gems, 2 of which will hit Garnet while the other 2 hit Amethyst and Pearl respectively. The projectiles will either be Bubbles that will burst on impact to deal damage, or Fish which will bounce off the Gems and land on the floor in front of the boss. If this happens, Blue Light will open it's mouth and expose it's weak point. Here, the player can attack the gem for extra damage. At the end of the turn, Blue Light will suck up the fish and close it's mouth. Blue Light is defeated before the fish are reabsorbed, they remain on the floor after the fight. It will also attack using Blue Shock, where it will fire and electric sphere at one of the Gems, which will paralyze them if not blocked.

characters.name: Blue Pearl
characters.description: Everyone, prepare yourselves emotionally for the overpowering elegance that is... Blue Diamond. Blue PearlNickname(s)Party Pearl (Steven)CharacteristicsSpeciesGemSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge8,000+TraitsHairPale blueGemstoneBlue pearlGem TypePearlProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gem HomeworldBlue Diamond(former owner/superior)Crystal Gems(ally)Occupation(s)Servant (formerly)BroadcasterArtistAlignmentHomeworld GemsPersonal StatusStatusActiveFriend(s)Steven UniverseYellow PearlBismuthMediaFirst Appearance"The Answer" (flashback)"Steven's Dream" (debut)Voice ActorDeedee Magno-HallPearl(orBlue Pearlas she is referred to by theCrewniverse) is aHomeworld Gemthat originally belonged toBlue Diamond. She first appeared in a flashback in "The Answer" and made her official debut in "Steven's Dream". Much like that of her friendYellow Pearl, she resides onEarth, living as a free Gem. Her height and physical frame are identical to theCrystal Gems'PearlandYellow Pearl; she is altogether very lean, with long legs and arms, and has a tall oval-shaped head with a prominent and pointed nose. She has sky blue skin and messy, chin-length powder blue hair. The upper portion of her face is covered by her bangs, similar to how her ownerBlue Diamondcovers her face with her hood. Her outfit consists of a sky blue leotard with an open diamond-shaped keyhole neckline (similar to Yellow Pearl's), a frost-blue, transparent, knee-length skirt, and pale blue flats. Her gemstone, a powder-blue cabochon pearl, is located on her chest.

characters.name: Bluebird Azurite
characters.description: Bluebird Azurite, at your service! Bluebird AzuriteNickname(s)BluebirdCharacteristicsSpeciesGemWeapon(s)Ice CutlassSexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerTraitsHairBurgundyEyeNavy blueGem TypeFusionComponentsAquamarine"Eyeball"Professional StatusAlignmentUnalignedPersonal StatusFriend(s)Garnet(formerly; one-sided)Amethyst(formerly; one-sided)Pearl(formerly; one-sided)Greg Universe(formerly; one-sided)MediaFirst Appearance"Bluebird"Music Theme"Bluebird"Voice ActorLarissa GallagherBluebird Azurite, orBluebirdfor short, is the unalignedfusionofAquamarineand"Eyeball" Ruby. She made her debut inthe episode of the same name. Bluebird is the shortest fusion in the franchise, being similar, albeit slightly larger than her component gems. She has an azure complexion with red and mint patches, a single navy blue eye and burgundy hair stylized in a bowl cut. She has six limbs, consisting of two arms and four legs. Her gemstones are embedded in her left eye and cheek respectively.

characters.name: Bookworm Monster
characters.description: Bookworm MonsterCharacteristicsSpeciesGem(presumed uncorrupted)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge+6,000TraitsGemstoneGreen gemPersonal StatusStatusUnknownMediaFirst AppearanceIssue 36ThisBookworm Monsterappeared inIssue 36of thecomic series. It serves at the main antagonist of the issue. In her corrupted form, the Bookworm Monster appears to have a green worm-like body with a large mouth filled with jagged white teeth at the front. The front of its body has large light-green pincers and similar to the appendages at the back of its body, except both pairs are pointed in different directions. Its gem is on top of its body. While in the Buddwick Public Library, Steven and Connie were looking for new books to check out. However, every book they were interested was mysteriously missing. After asking the librarian, she informs them that all of the books they were looking for had not been checked out, and so they must be missing for another reason.

characters.name: Bookworm Monster
characters.description: Bookworm MonsterCharacteristicsSpeciesGem(presumed uncorrupted)SexSexlessGender PronounShe/HerAge+6,000TraitsGemstoneGreen gemPersonal StatusStatusUnknownMediaFirst AppearanceIssue 36ThisBookworm Monsterappeared inIssue 36of thecomic series. It serves at the main antagonist of the issue. In her corrupted form, the Bookworm Monster appears to have a green worm-like body with a large mouth filled with jagged white teeth at the front. The front of its body has large light-green pincers and similar to the appendages at the back of its body, except both pairs are pointed in different directions. Its gem is on top of its body. While in the Buddwick Public Library, Steven and Connie were looking for new books to check out. However, every book they were interested was mysteriously missing. After asking the librarian, she informs them that all of the books they were looking for had not been checked out, and so they must be missing for another reason.

characters.name: Buddy Buddwick
characters.description: Buddy BuddwickCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleProfessional StatusOccupation(s)AuthorPersonal StatusStatusDeceasedFriend(s)William DeweyCrystal GemsMediaFirst Appearance"Historical Friction" (portrayed byJamie)"Buddy's Book" (pictured)Buddy Buddwickwas a renowned author from the 19thcentury as well asCaptain William Dewey's first mate. His works can be found in theBuddwick Public Librarylocated inBeach City. Buddy's appearance is only seen at the end of the episode "Buddy's Book", on a painting. He appears as a plump man with brown hair, thick eyebrows and mustache, and a large bald spot atop of his head. He wears a traditional blue-green military coat decorated with a white jabot, round glasses, and a small derby hat. InStevenandConnie's imagination, his appearance is that ofJamie's. He wears a dark colored, golden-buttoned coat, with a dark blue colored shirt underneath. He also wears tan-colored tights, and dark brown boots, along with a matching black hat atop his head.

He wears a traditional blue-green military coat decorated with a white jabot, round glasses, and a small derby hat. InStevenandConnie's imagination, his appearance is that ofJamie's. characters.name: Cactus Steven
characters.description: The Gems don't need me!  I thought I could talk to you. Cactus StevenGrownBabyCharacteristicsSpeciesSentient cactusSexUnknownGender PronounHe/HimPersonal StatusStatusAliveRelative(s)Steven Universe(creator)Friend(s)Steven UniverseMediaFirst Appearance"Prickly Pair"Music Theme"Cactus Steven"Voice ActorZach CallisonCactus Stevenis a sentient humanoid cactus created bySteven Universe. His only appearance was in "Prickly Pair". He was created by Steven to be a simple plant, however he soon became a threat, mimicking and saying many of Steven's insults. After making up with theCrystal Gems, he breaks through the walls of theCrystal Temple, walking into the sunset. Cactus Steven initially looks like a typical cactus with a dark green hue. However, after coming into contact with his creator, Steven's magical spit, he begins to take on characteristics resembling Steven. These traits include eyes, a mouth, and hemispherical bumps that mimic the shape of Steven's hair.
